zh.lifeSummary: 當Signeur Warin de Montagne於大約0965年出生在法國巴-諾門迪奧內阿倫c時，他的父親Guillaume I de Bellême-4歲，母親Mathilde de Ganelon-3歲。他和Melisende de Châteaudun至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於大約1026年在法國巴-諾門迪奧內多福洛特享年63歲，埋葬在法國諾門迪奧內多福洛特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Signeur Warin de Montagne于大约0965年出生在法国巴-諾門迪奧內阿倫c时，他的父亲Guillaume I de Bellême-4岁，母亲Mathilde de Ganelon-3岁。他和Melisende de Châteaudun至少有2个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于大约1026年在法国巴-諾門迪奧內多福洛特享年63岁，埋葬在法国諾門迪奧內多福洛特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Montagne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Francoise, Herve, Marcel, Philippe, Pierre.

French: topographic name for someone who lived on or near a hill, from Old French montaine ‘hill, (small) mountain’; or a habitational name from any of several places called (La) Montagne, named with the same word.

variants.name: Mountain
meanings: English (Yorkshire; of Norman origin): topographic name from Middle English mountaine ‘mountain’ (Old French montagne). See Montagne .
Irish: either of Norman origin, as 1 above, or a variant of   Manton  .

English: variant of Monkton a habitational name from Monkton (Kent, Somerset), Moor Monkton and Nun Monkton (Yorkshire), Bishop Monkton (Yorkshire), or any of numerous other places called Monkton, named with Old English munuc ‘monk’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Lamontagne
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Lucien, Marcel, Emile, Pierre, Aime, Andre, Fernand, Normand, Gaston, Ovide, Achille.
habitational name for someone from any of several places called La Montagne, or a variant of the topographic name Montagne 1, with fused feminine definite article la.

nameMeanings.name: Warin
meanings: An old name. The same as Waring or Guerin, who came over with the Conqueror; a name probably connected with that of the Waernas or Wernas. the Varini or Verini, a people of the Elbe

en.lifeSummary: When Signeur Warin de Montagne was born about 0965, in Alençon, Orne, Lower Normandy, France, his father, Guillaume I de Bellême, was -4 and his mother, Mathilde de Ganelon, was -3. He had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Melisende de Châteaudun. He died about 1026, in Domfront, Orne, Lower Normandy, France, at the age of 63, and was buried in Domfront, Orne, Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Signeur Warin de Montagne est né environ 0965, à Alençon, Orne, Basse-Normandie, France, son père, Guillaume I de Bellême, avait -4 ans et sa mère, Mathilde de Ganelon, avait -3 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Melisende de Châteaudun. Il est décédé environ 1026, à Domfront, Orne, Basse-Normandie, France, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Domfront, Orne, Normandie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Signeur Warin de Montagne um 0965 in Alençon, Orne, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guillaume I de Bellême -4 und seine Mutter Mathilde de Ganelon -3. Er hatte mit Melisende de Châteaudun mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb um 1026 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Domfront, Orne, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich und wurde in Domfront, Orne, Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Signeur Warin de Montagne è nato il circa 0965 nel Alençon, Orne, Basse-Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Guillaume I de Bellême, aveva -4 anni e il suo madre, Mathilde de Ganelon, aveva -3 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con Melisende de Châteaudun. Morì circa 1026, nel Domfront, Orne, Basse-Normandie, Francia, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolto a Domfront, Orne, Normandie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Signeur Warin de Montagneが約0965年にフランスバセ-ノーマンディオルンアレンcオンで生まれた時，父Guillaume I de Bellêmeは-4歳，母Mathilde de Ganelonは-3歳であった。彼はMelisende de Châteaudunとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1026年にフランスバセ-ノーマンディオルンドムフロントで63歳で死去し，フランスノーマンディオルンドムフロントにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Signeur Warin de Montagne(이)가 대략 0965년 프랑스 배세-노먼디 른 알렌c에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guillaume I de Bellême(은)는 -4세였고, 그의 어머니 Mathilde de Ganelon(은)는 -3세였다. 그는 Melisende de Châteaudun(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1026년 프랑스 배세-노먼디 른 돔프론트에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 노먼디 른 돔프론트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Signeur Warin de Montagne nasceu aproximadamente 0965, em Alençon, Orne, Basse-Normandie, França, seu pai, Guillaume I de Bellême, tinha -4 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde de Ganelon, tinha -3 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas com Melisende de Châteaudun. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1026, em Domfront, Orne, Basse-Normandie, França, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em Domfront, Orne, Normandie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Signeur Warin de Montagne родился около 0965 г. в местности аленcон, орн, бассе-норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Guillaume I de Bellême было -4 год, а матери, которую звали Mathilde de Ganelon, -3. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Melisende de Châteaudun. Он умер около 1026 г. в местности домфронт, орн, бассе-норманди, Франция в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности домфронт, орн, норманди, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Signeur Warin de Montagne nació aproximadamente 0965, en Alençon, Orne, Basse-Normandie, Francia, su papá, Guillaume I de Bellême, tenía -4 años y su mamá, Mathilde de Ganelon, tenía -3 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas con Melisende de Châteaudun. Murió aproximadamente 1026, en Domfront, Orne, Basse-Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultado en Domfront, Orne, Normandie, Francia.
